30504.title: Zoning for Profits: How Public Finance Shapes Land Supply in China
30504.zh_title: 为利润而分区：公共财政如何塑造中国的土地供应
30504.authors: Zhiguo He, Scott T. Nelson, Yang Su, Anthony Lee Zhang, Fudong Zhang
30504.abstract: Public finance and real estate are uniquely intertwined in China, where local governments also serve as monopolist sellers of land. We shed new light on how land sale decisions and land prices depend on local governments’ financing objectives. First, we document the large (ten-fold) price premium paid for residential-zoned relative to industrial-zoned land and show this price premium can be explained by the greater future tax revenues generated by industrial land; the choice to sell land as industrial rather than residential generates an IRR of 7.70%, which is comparable to local governments’ cost of capital in bond markets. Second, local governments are sensitive to financing constraints: industrial land supply decreases with governments’ bond yields. Third, local governments’ land sales are sensitive to the intergovernmental tax sharing, such that industrial land sales increase with the share of taxes captured by local governments. Thus, shocks to local public finances can be expected to affect the Chinese real estate market and vice versa.
30504.zh_abstract: 在中国，公共财政与房地产有着独特的交织关系，地方政府同时也是土地的垄断卖方。我们揭示了土地出售决策和土地价格如何依赖于地方政府的融资目标。首先，我们记录了住宅用地相对于工业用地所支付的大额（十倍）价格溢价，并表明这一价格溢价可以用工业用地产生的未来税收收入更高来解释；选择将土地作为工业用地而非住宅用地出售，会产生7.70%的内部收益率，这与地方政府在债券市场上的资本成本相当。其次，地方政府对融资约束很敏感：工业用地供应随着政府债券收益率的上升而减少。第三，地方政府的土地销售对政府间税收分成敏感，因此工业用地销售随着地方政府截留的税收份额增加而增加。因此，地方公共财政的冲击预计会影响中国的房地产市场，反之亦然。
30504.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, PE, POL；JEL：G31, H70, R14, R38

30503.title: Macroeconomic and Asset Pricing Effects of Supply Chain Disasters
30503.zh_title: 供应链灾难的宏观经济与资产定价效应
30503.abstract: We build a general equilibrium production-based asset pricing model with heterogeneous firms that jointly accounts for firm-level and aggregate facts emphasized by the recent macroeconomic literature, and for important asset pricing moments. Using administrative firm-level data, we establish empirical properties of large negative idiosyncratic shocks and their evolution. We then demonstrate that these shocks play an important role for delivering both macroeconomic and asset pricing predictions. Finally, we combine our model with data on the universe of U.S. seaborne import since 2007, and establish the importance of supply chain disasters for the cross-section of asset prices.
30503.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含异质性企业的生产型一般均衡资产定价模型，该模型同时解释了近期宏观经济文献所强调的企业层面和总体事实，以及重要的资产定价矩。利用行政企业层面数据，我们建立了大型负面异质性冲击及其演变的经验特征。然后，我们证明这些冲击在提供宏观经济和资产定价预测方面都发挥着重要作用。最后，我们将模型与2007年以来美国所有海运进口数据相结合，确立了供应链灾难对资产价格横截面差异的重要性。
30503.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：E0, F40, G0

30502.title: The U.S. Manufacturing Sector’s Response to Higher Electricity Prices: Evidence from State-Level Renewable Portfolio Standards
30502.zh_title: 美国制造业对更高电价的反应：来自州级可再生能源组合标准的证据
30502.authors: Ann Wolverton, Ronald Shadbegian, Wayne B. Gray
30502.abstract: While several papers examine the effects of renewable portfolio standards (RPS) on electricity prices, they mainly rely on state-level data and there has been little research on how RPS policies affect manufacturing activity via their effect on electricity prices. Using plant-level data for the entire U.S. manufacturing sector and all electric utilities from 1992 – 2015, we jointly estimate the effect of RPS adoption and stringency on plant-level electricity prices and production decisions. To ensure that our results are not sensitive to possible pre-existing differences across manufacturing plants in RPS and non-RPS states, we implement coarsened exact covariate matching. Our results suggest that electricity prices for plants in RPS states averaged about 2% higher than in non-RPS states, notably lower than prior estimates based on state-level data. In response to these higher electricity prices, we estimate that plant electricity usage declined by 1.2% for all plants and 1.8% for energy-intensive plants, broadly consistent with published estimates of the elasticity of electricity demand for industrial users. We find smaller declines in output, employment, and hours worked (relative to the decline in electricity use). Finally, several key RPS policy design features that vary substantially from state-to-state produce heterogeneous effects on plant-level electricity prices.
30502.zh_abstract: 虽然有几篇论文研究了可再生能源组合标准（RPS）对电价的影响，但它们主要依赖州级数据，并且关于RPS政策如何通过影响电价进而影响制造业活动的研究很少。利用1992年至2015年整个美国制造业和所有电力公用事业的企业层面数据，我们联合估计了RPS采纳及其严格程度对企业层面电价和生产决策的影响。为了确保我们的结果不受RPS州和非RPS州制造业企业之间可能存在的预先存在差异的影响，我们实施了粗化精确匹配。我们的结果表明，RPS州企业的电价平均比非RPS州高出约2%，显著低于先前基于州级数据的估计。作为对这些更高电价的回应，我们估计所有企业的用电量下降了1.2%，能源密集型企业的用电量下降了1.8%，这与已发表的工业用户电力需求弹性估计值大致一致。我们发现产出、就业和工作时间的下降幅度（相对于用电量的下降）较小。最后，各州之间差异很大的几个关键RPS政策设计特征对企业层面的电价产生了异质性影响。

30501.title: Managing Public Portfolios
30501.authors: Leo R. Aparisi de Lannoy, Anmol Bhandari, David Evans, Mikhail Golosov, Thomas J. Sargent
30501.abstract: We develop a unified framework for optimally managing public portfolios for a class of macro-finance models that include widely-used specifications for households' risk and liquidity preferences, market structures for financial assets, and trading frictions. An optimal portfolio hedges fluctuations in interest rates, primary surpluses, liquidities and inequalities. It recognizes liquidity benefits that government debts provide and internalizes equilibrium effects of public policies on financial asset prices. We express an optimal portfolio in terms of statistics that are functions only of macro and financial market data. An application to the U.S. shows that hedging interest rate risk plays a dominant role in shaping an optimal maturity structure of government debt.
30501.zh_abstract: 我们为一个宏观金融模型类别开发了一个最优管理公共投资组合的统一框架，该模型类别包括家庭风险和流动性偏好、金融资产市场结构以及交易摩擦的广泛使用的设定。一个最优投资组合对冲利率、初级盈余、流动性和不平等的波动。它认识到政府债务提供的流动性收益，并将公共政策对金融资产价格的均衡效应内部化。我们用仅依赖于宏观和金融市场数据的统计量来表达一个最优投资组合。一个应用于美国的例子表明，对冲利率风险在塑造政府债务的最优期限结构中起着主导作用。

30500.title: Racial Diversity in Private Capital Fundraising
30500.zh_title: 私募资本募资中的种族多样性
30500.authors: Johan Cassel, Josh Lerner, Emmanuel Yimfor
30500.abstract: Black- and Hispanic-owned funds control a very modest share of assets in the private capital industry. We find that the sensitivity of follow-on fundraising to fund performance is greater for minority-owned groups, particularly for underperforming groups. We find little support for a number of explanations for these patterns: that minority fund valuations are overstated, that minority funds encounter difficulties in hiring personnel, or that deploying capital is more difficult for these funds. We do find that the ability of minority groups to raise capital increases during periods of high racial awareness and when the chief investment officer of local public pension plans and endowments are minorities. Together, the results support the hypothesis that the modest representation of Black and Hispanic-owned firms in private capital stems at least partially from the nature of investor demand, rather than the supply of fund managers.
30500.zh_abstract: 黑人和西班牙裔拥有的基金在私募资本行业中控制的资产份额非常有限。我们发现，后续募资对基金业绩的敏感性在少数族裔拥有的集团中更大，特别是对于业绩不佳的集团。我们几乎没有发现支持这些模式的一些解释的证据：少数族裔基金的估值被夸大，少数族裔基金在招聘人员方面遇到困难，或者这些基金部署资本更加困难。我们确实发现，在种族意识高涨时期，以及当地方公共养老金计划和捐赠基金的首席投资官是少数族裔时，少数族裔群体筹集资金的能力会提高。总之，这些结果支持了以下假设：黑人和西班牙裔拥有的公司在私募资本中的代表性不足至少部分源于投资者需求的性质，而不是基金经理的供给。

30528.title: Automation and Polarization
30528.abstract: We develop an assignment model of automation. Each of a continuum of tasks of variable complexity is assigned to either capital or one of a continuum of labor skills. We characterize conditions for interior automation, whereby tasks of intermediate complexity are assigned to capital. Interior automation arises when the most skilled workers have a comparative advantage in the most complex tasks relative to capital, and because the wages of the least skilled workers are sufficiently low relative to their productivity and the effective cost of capital in low-complexity tasks. Minimum wages and other sources of higher wages at the bottom make interior automation less likely. Starting with interior automation, a reduction in the cost of capital (or an increase in capital productivity) causes employment and wage polarization. Specifically, further automation pushes workers into tasks at the lower and upper ends of the task distribution. It also monotonically increases the skill premium above a skill threshold and reduces the skill premium below this threshold. Moreover, automation tends to reduce the real wage of workers with comparative advantage profiles close to that of capital. We show that large enough increases in capital productivity ultimately induce a transition to low-skill automation and qualitatively alter the effects of automation - thereafter inducing monotone increases in skill premia rather than wage polarization.
30528.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个自动化的任务分配模型。每个具有不同复杂度的连续任务被分配给资本或一系列连续劳动技能中的一种。我们刻画了内部自动化的条件，即中等复杂度的任务被分配给资本。当技能最高的工人相对于资本在最复杂任务中具有比较优势，并且技能最低的工人的工资相对于其生产率以及在低复杂度任务中的有效资本成本足够低时，内部自动化就会出现。最低工资和底部其他导致更高工资的来源使得内部自动化不太可能发生。从内部自动化开始，资本成本的降低（或资本生产率的提高）会导致就业和工资极化。具体来说，进一步的自动化将工人推向任务分布的低端和高端。它还会单调地提高高于某个技能门槛的技能溢价，并降低低于该门槛的技能溢价。此外，自动化往往会降低那些比较优势特征与资本相近的工人的实际工资。我们表明，足够大的资本生产率增长最终会引发向低技能自动化的转变，并从根本上改变自动化的影响——此后会导致技能溢价的单调增长，而非工资极化。

30527.title: How to Run Surveys: A Guide to Creating Your Own Identifying Variation and Revealing the Invisible
30527.zh_title: 如何开展调查：创建自身识别变异与揭示隐性因素的指南
30527.abstract: Surveys are an essential approach for eliciting otherwise invisible factors such as perceptions, knowledge and beliefs, attitudes, and reasoning. These factors are critical determinants of social, economic, and political outcomes. Surveys are not merely a research tool. They are also not only a way of collecting data. Instead, they involve creating the process that will generate the data. This allows the researcher to create their own identifying and controlled variation. Thanks to the rise of mobile technologies and platforms, surveys offer valuable opportunities to study either broadly representative samples or focus on specific groups. This paper offers guidance on the complete survey process, from the design of the questions and experiments to the recruitment of respondents and the collection of data to the analysis of survey responses. It covers issues related to the sampling process, selection and attrition, attention and carelessness, survey question design and measurement, response biases, and survey experiments.
30527.zh_abstract: 调查是揭示感知、知识和信念、态度以及推理等隐性因素的基本方法。这些因素是决定社会、经济和政治结果的关键因素。调查不仅仅是一种研究工具，也不仅仅是收集数据的一种方式。相反，它们涉及创建将生成数据的过程。这使得研究者能够创建自身的识别变异和受控变异。得益于移动技术和平台的兴起，调查为研究广泛代表性样本或关注特定群体提供了宝贵的机会。本文提供了关于完整调查过程的指导，从问题和实验的设计，到受访者的招募和数据的收集，再到调查响应的分析。它涵盖了与抽样过程、选择和损耗、注意力和粗心、调查问题设计和测量、响应偏差以及调查实验相关的问题。
30527.meta: Programs：LS, PE, POL；JEL：D9, H0, J0, P20

30526.title: Work From Home and the Office Real Estate Apocalypse
30526.zh_title: 远程办公与写字楼房地产末日
30526.authors: Arpit Gupta, Vrinda Mittal, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
30526.abstract: We study the impact of remote work on the commercial office sector. We document large shifts in lease revenues, office occupancy, lease renewal rates, lease durations, and market rents as firms shifted to remote work in the wake of the Covid-19 pandemic. We show that the pandemic has had large effects on both current and expected future cash flows for office buildings. Remote work also changes the risk premium on office real estate. We revalue the stock of New York City commercial office buildings taking into account pandemic-induced cash flow and discount rate effects. We find a 45% decline in office values in 2020 and 39% in the longer-run, the latter representing a $\$453$ billion value destruction. Higher quality office buildings were somewhat buffered against these trends due to a flight to quality, while lower quality office buildings see much more dramatic swings. These valuation changes have repercussions for local public finances and financial sector stability.
30526.zh_abstract: 我们研究了远程工作对商业办公领域的影响。我们记录了在新冠疫情后企业转向远程工作时，租赁收入、写字楼入住率、续租率、租赁期限和市场租金的巨大变化。我们表明，疫情对写字楼当前的现金流和预期的未来现金流都产生了巨大影响。远程工作还改变了写字楼房地产的风险溢价。我们重新评估了纽约市商业写字楼存量，考虑了疫情引发的现金流和贴现率效应。我们发现，2020年写字楼价值下降了45%，长期下降39%，后者代表着4530亿美元的价值毁灭。由于向优质资产的转移，较高质量的写字楼在一定程度上缓冲了这些趋势，而较低质量的写字楼则经历了更为剧烈的波动。这些估值变化对地方公共财政和金融部门稳定产生了影响。
30526.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PE；JEL：G10, G17, R00, R33

30525.title: Horses for Courses: Measuring Foreign Supply Chain Exposure
30525.zh_title: 各取所需：衡量外国供应链暴露度
30525.authors: Richard Baldwin, Rebecca Freeman, Angelos Theodorakopoulos
30525.abstract: Perceptions of global supply chains (GSCs) have shifted in recent years from a positive to a more cautious view. Standard GSC measures have mostly not adapted to this change as they focus on participation in, rather than exposure to, foreign supply chains. This paper presents the tools necessary to track foreign GSC exposure, and introduces a systematic shocks approach to GSC indicator design. We use this to develop indicators that gauge the impact of a variety of foreign shocks. We argue that different indicators are appropriate to different questions and show that they can provide qualitatively different answers to the same foreign exposure question.
30525.zh_abstract: 近年来，对全球供应链的看法已从积极转向更为谨慎。标准的全球供应链衡量指标大多未能适应这一变化，因为它们关注的是参与外国供应链，而非暴露于外国供应链。本文提出了追踪外国供应链暴露度所需的工具，并介绍了一种系统性的冲击方法来设计全球供应链指标。我们利用这一点来开发衡量各种外国冲击影响的指标。我们认为，不同的指标适用于不同的问题，并表明它们可能对相同的外国暴露问题给出性质不同的答案。
30525.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：D57, F13, F14, F15, F60, R15

30524.title: Global Trends in Income Inequality and Income Dynamics: New Insights from GRID
30524.zh_title: 全球收入不平等与收入动态趋势：来自GRID的新见解
30524.authors: Fatih Guvenen, Luigi Pistaferri, Giovanni L. Violante
30524.abstract: The Global Repository of Income Dynamics (GRID) is a new open-access, cross- country database that contains a wide range of micro statistics on income inequality, dynamics, and mobility. It has four key characteristics: it is built on micro panel data drawn from administrative records; it fully exploits the longitudinal dimension of the underlying datasets; it offers granular descriptions of income inequality and income dynamics for finely defined subpopulations; and it is designed from the ground up with the goals of harmonization and cross-country comparability. This paper introduces the database and presents a set of global trends in income inequality and income dynamics across the 13 countries that are currently in GRID. Our results are based on the statistics created for GRID by the 13 country teams who also contributed to this special issue with individual articles.
30524.zh_abstract: 全球收入动态数据库是一个新的开放获取、跨国数据库，包含关于收入不平等、动态和流动性的广泛微观统计数据。它有四个关键特征：它建立在来自行政记录的微观面板数据之上；它充分利用了基础数据集的纵向维度；它为精细定义的子群体提供了收入不平等和收入动态的详细描述；并且它从一开始就以协调和跨国可比性为目标进行设计。本文介绍了该数据库，并展示了目前GRID中13个国家在收入不平等和收入动态方面的一系列全球趋势。我们的结果基于13个国家团队为GRID创建的统计数据，这些团队也以各自文章的形式为本特刊做出了贡献。

30523.title: Are Immigrants more Left leaning than Natives?
30523.zh_title: 移民是否比本地人更左倾？
30523.authors: Simone Moriconi, Giovanni Peri, Riccardo Turati
30523.abstract: We analyze whether second-generation immigrants have different political preferences relative to observationally identical children of citizens in the host countries. Using data on individual voting behavior in 22 European countries between 2001 and 2017, we characterize each vote on a left-right scale based on the ideological and policy positions of the party receiving the vote. In the first part of the paper, we characterize the size of the "left-wing bias" in the vote of second-generation immigrants after controlling for a large set of individual characteristics and origin and destination country fixed effects. We find a significant left-wing bias of second-generation immigrants, comparable in magnitude to the left-wing bias associated with living in urban (rather than rural) areas. We then show that this left-wing bias is associated with stronger preferences for inequality-reducing government intervention, internationalism and multiculturalism. We do not find that second-generation immigrants are biased towards or away from populist political agendas.
30523.zh_abstract: 我们分析了第二代移民是否与东道国中观察特征相同的公民子女具有不同的政治偏好。利用2001年至2017年间22个欧洲国家的个人投票行为数据，我们根据接收投票的政党的意识形态和政策立场，将每次投票置于左-右光谱上。在论文的第一部分，我们在控制了大量个人特征以及来源国和目的地国固定效应后，刻画了第二代移民投票中“左翼偏向”的大小。我们发现第二代移民存在显著的左翼偏向，其幅度与居住在城市（而非农村）地区相关的左翼偏向相当。然后我们表明，这种左翼偏向与对减少不平等的政府干预、国际主义和文化多元主义的更强偏好相关。我们没有发现第二代移民倾向于或远离民粹主义政治议程。

30522.title: War, Influenza, and U.S. Carbon Intensity.
30522.zh_title: 战争、流感与美国碳强度
30522.abstract: Carbon intensity from fossil fuel use in the United States economy peaked in 1917. World War I ended, and the Spanish Flu pandemic broke out one year later in 1918. This paper contends that these events, coupled with associated turmoil in the domestic coal industry, were largely responsible for the turning point in carbon intensity. It is instructive to consider that geopolitics, labor markets, and public health at the time of peak carbon intensity bear relevance to the global economy from 2019 to the present. Interventions in markets intended to mitigate detrimental consequences of pandemic and war may induce ancillary impacts for long-run climate change and environmental quality.
30522.zh_abstract: 美国经济中化石燃料使用的碳强度在1917年达到峰值。第一次世界大战结束，西班牙流感大流行于一年后的1918年爆发。本文认为，这些事件，加上国内煤炭行业的相关动荡，在很大程度上是碳强度出现转折点的原因。值得思考的是，碳强度达到峰值时的地缘政治、劳动力市场和公共卫生状况，与2019年至今的全球经济具有相关性。旨在减轻疫情和战争不利后果的市场干预措施，可能会对长期气候变化和环境质量产生附带影响。
30522.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE；JEL：N41, N42, N51, N52, N71, N72, Q43, Q54

30521.title: Know Your Customer: Informed Trading by Banks
30521.zh_title: 了解你的客户：银行的内幕交易
30521.authors: Rainer Haselmann, Christian Leuz, Sebastian Schreiber
30521.abstract: This study analyzes information production and trading behavior of banks with lending relationships. We combine trade-by-trade supervisory data and credit-registry data to examine banks' proprietary trading in borrower stocks around a large number of corporate events. We find that relationship banks build up positive (negative) trading positions in the two weeks before events with positive (negative) news, even when these events are unscheduled, and unwind positions shortly after the event. This trading pattern is more pronounced when banks are likely to possess private information about their borrowers and cannot be explained by specialized expertise in certain industries or firms. The results suggest that banks' lending relationships inform their trading and underscore the potential for conflicts of interest in universal banking—a prominent concern in the regulatory debate for a long time. Our analysis also illustrates how combining large data sets can enhance the supervision of markets and financial institutions.
30521.zh_abstract: 本研究分析了具有贷款关系的银行的信息生产和交易行为。我们结合逐笔交易监管数据和信贷登记数据，研究了银行在大量公司事件前后对其借款人股票的自营交易。我们发现，关系银行在利好消息事件（利空消息事件）发生前的两周内建立正（负）交易头寸，即使这些事件是非计划性的，并在事件发生后不久平仓。当银行可能拥有关于其借款人的私人信息时，这种交易模式更为明显，并且不能用特定行业或公司的专业专长来解释。结果表明，银行的贷款关系为其交易提供了信息，并突显了全能银行中潜在的利益冲突——这是长期以来监管辩论中的一个突出担忧。我们的分析还说明了如何通过整合大型数据集来加强对市场和金融机构的监管。
30521.meta: Programs：CF, LE；JEL：G01, G14, G15, G18, G21, G24, G28, G38, K22

30520.title: Assessing School District Decision-Making: Evidence from the COVID-19 Pandemic
30520.zh_title: 评估学区决策：来自COVID-19大流行的证据
30520.authors: Alvin Christian, Brian Jacob, John D. Singleton
30520.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic drew new attention to the role of school boards in the U.S. In this paper, we examine school districts’ choices of learning modality—whether and when to offer in-person, virtual, or hybrid instruction—over the course of the 2020-21 pandemic school year. The analysis takes advantage of granular weekly data on learning mode and COVID-19 cases for Ohio school districts. We show that districts respond on the margin to health risks: all else equal, a marginal increase in new cases reduces the probability that a district offers in-person instruction the next week. Moreover, this negative response is magnified when the district was in-person the prior week and attenuates in magnitude over the school year. These findings are consistent with districts learning from experience about the effect of in-person learning on disease transmission in schools. We also find evidence that districts are influenced by the decisions of their peers.
30520.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行重新引起了人们对美国学校董事会角色的关注。在本文中，我们研究了学区在2020-21学年期间对教学模式的选择——即是否以及何时提供面对面、虚拟或混合教学。该分析利用了俄亥俄州学区关于教学模式和COVID-19病例的详细周度数据。我们发现，学区会在边际上对健康风险做出反应：在其他条件相同的情况下，新增病例的边际增加会降低学区下周提供面对面教学的概率。此外，当学区前一周处于面对面教学状态时，这种负面反应会加剧，并且其幅度在整个学年中逐渐减弱。这些发现与学区从经验中学习面对面教学对学校内疾病传播影响的情况一致。我们还发现，学区会受到同行决策的影响。
30520.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H0, H10, H30, I20, I21

30519.title: A Tale of Tier 3 Cities
30519.abstract: This paper provides new estimates of the housing stock, construction rates and price developments by city tier in China in order to understand where excess supply might be concentrated, and the implications of any significant contraction. We also update estimates of the size of China’s rapidly evolving real estate sector through 2021, allowing one to look at the initial impact of COVID-19, as well as extending the analysis to incorporate urban-expansion related infrastructure construction. We argue that China overall faces imbalances between supply and demand for housing stock, but the problem is significantly deeper in the generally smaller and lower income tier 3 cities, which nevertheless account for more than 60% of both China’s GDP and its housing stock.
30519.zh_abstract: 本文提供了按城市层级划分的中国住房存量、建设率和价格发展的新估计，以了解过剩供应可能集中在何处，以及任何显著收缩的影响。我们还更新了截至2021年中国快速发展的房地产行业规模的估计，从而可以考察COVID-19的初步影响，并将分析扩展到包括与城市扩张相关的基础设施建设。我们认为，中国整体上面临住房存量供需失衡的问题，但在通常规模较小且收入较低的三线城市，问题更为严重，然而这些城市占中国GDP和住房存量的比例均超过60%。

30518.title: Neoclassical Growth with Limited Commitment
30518.zh_title: 有限承诺下的新古典增长
30518.abstract: We characterize the stationary equilibrium of a continuous-time neoclassical production economy with capital accumulation in which agents can insure against idiosyncratic income risk by trading state-contingent assets, subject to limited commitment constraints that rule out short-selling. For an N-state Poisson labor productivity process we provide the household consumption-asset allocation, stationary asset distribution and aggregate capital supply. When production is Cobb-Douglas, when productivity takes two values, of which one is zero, and when agents have log-utility, we calculate the equilibrium interest rate, capital stock and consumption distribution in closed form, including its comparative statics change with respect to idiosyncratic income risk.
30518.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了一个具有资本积累的连续时间新古典生产经济中的稳态均衡，其中代理人可以通过交易状态依存资产来抵御异质性收入风险，但受到禁止卖空的有限承诺约束。对于N状态的泊松劳动生产率过程，我们提供了家庭消费-资产配置、稳态资产分布和总资本供给。当生产函数为柯布-道格拉斯形式、生产率取两个值（其中一个为零）且代理人具有对数效用时，我们以闭式解形式计算了均衡利率、资本存量和消费分布，包括其关于异质性收入风险的比较静态变化。

30517.title: Culture Clash: Incompatible Reputation Mechanisms and Intergroup Conflict
30517.zh_title: 文化冲突：不相容的声誉机制与群体间冲突
30517.abstract: Under what conditions does intergroup contact lead to conflict? We provide a novel answer to this question by highlighting the role of reputation mechanisms in sustaining cooperation. Reputational concerns can deter defection in one-time interactions within a group, but the informational content of reputation can differ across groups. We consider two types of information. Punishment-based reputation (a "culture of honor") represents past sanctioning behavior of individuals, while a reputation based on image scoring captures past cooperative and uncooperative acts. While either type can successfully sustain cooperation within a group, we show theoretically that interactions of individuals from a punishment-based culture with those from a culture of image scoring can lead to widespread inter-group tensions. Mutual cooperation is a more likely outcome if both cultures use a similar reputation mechanism. We find empirical support for the model's predictions across phenomena related to the emergence of social tensions. Cross-cultural differences in the importance of retaliation predict patterns of host population discrimination against immigrants and variation in bilateral conflict across ethnic groups.
30517.zh_abstract: 在什么条件下，群体间接触会导致冲突？我们通过强调声誉机制在维持合作中的作用，为这个问题提供了一个新颖的答案。声誉关切可以阻止群体内一次性互动中的背叛行为，但声誉的信息内容在不同群体间可能不同。我们考虑两种类型的信息。基于惩罚的声誉（一种“荣誉文化”）代表个人过去的制裁行为，而基于形象评分的声誉则捕捉过去合作与不合作的行为。虽然任何一种类型都能成功维持群体内的合作，但我们从理论上表明，来自惩罚文化背景的个体与来自形象评分文化背景的个体之间的互动可能导致广泛的群体间紧张关系。如果两种文化使用相似的声誉机制，相互合作更有可能成为结果。我们在与社会紧张局势出现相关的现象中找到了模型预测的实证支持。报复重要性的跨文化差异预测了东道国人口对移民的歧视模式以及不同族群间双边冲突的变化。

30516.title: Housing Dynamics: Theory Behind Empirics
30516.zh_title: 住房动态：实证背后的理论
30516.abstract: To fill the knowledge gap that previous studies ignore either housing or internal urban structure and to enable better fit with important stylized facts, we construct a two-sector optimal growth model of housing where housing is produced by land and housing structure/household durables. We explicitly model within-city locational choice. Housing services derive positive utility but are decayed away from the city center. Our model enables a full characterization of the dynamic paths of housing and housing and land prices. The model is then calibrated to fit part of the stylized facts: faster growth of housing structure/household durables than housing, faster growth of land prices than housing prices, and downward housing price and land rent gradients within a city. The calibrated model can then be used to predict the remaining untargeted part of stylized facts: a locationally steeper land rent gradient than the housing price gradient, relatively flatter housing quantity and price gradients in larger cities with flatter population gradients and moderate rise in the housing expenditure share. The calibrated model can be further used to yield additional insights on housing dynamics and spatial distribution. We find nonhomotheticities in housing preference and housing production are crucial for realistic model predictions.
30516.zh_abstract: 为了填补以往研究忽视住房或城市内部结构的知识空白，并更好地拟合重要的典型事实，我们构建了一个两部门住房最优增长模型，其中住房由土地和住房结构/家庭耐用品生产。我们明确建模了城市内的区位选择。住房服务带来正效用，但会随着远离市中心而衰减。我们的模型能够全面刻画住房、住房价格和土地价格的动态路径。然后，我们对模型进行校准，以拟合部分典型事实：住房结构/家庭耐用品比住房增长更快，土地价格比住房价格增长更快，以及城市内住房价格和土地租金梯度向下倾斜。校准后的模型随后可用于预测剩余未针对的典型事实：土地租金梯度在区位上比住房价格梯度更陡峭，大城市中住房数量和价格梯度相对更平坦，人口梯度更平坦，住房支出份额适度上升。校准后的模型还可进一步用于得出关于住房动态和空间分布的额外见解。我们发现，住房偏好和住房生产中的非位似性对于实现现实的模型预测至关重要。

30515.title: Urban-Biased Growth: A Macroeconomic Analysis
30515.zh_title: 偏向城市的增长：一项宏观经济分析
30515.authors: Fabian Eckert, Sharat Ganapati, Conor Walsh
30515.abstract: Since 1980, US wage growth has been concentrated in high-density locations, nearly doubling the wage-density elasticity across cities. We show that this urban-biased growth originates entirely at large, IT-intensive firms in the Business Services sector. We propose a simple explanation centered on the dramatic decline in IT prices over this period. First, a complementarity between IT capital and firm scale makes large firms benefit most from cheaper IT capital. Second, because large Business Services firms are concentrated in dense cities, falling IT prices generate urban-biased growth. Disciplining this mechanism with firm-level data, we find that the observed decline in IT prices accounts for approximately 75% of the increase in the wage-density gradient.
30515.zh_abstract: 自1980年以来，美国工资增长集中在高密度地区，使得城市间的工资-密度弹性几乎翻倍。我们表明，这种偏向城市的增长完全源于商业服务部门中大型、IT密集型的企业。我们提出了一个简单的解释，其核心是这一时期IT价格的急剧下降。首先，IT资本与企业规模之间的互补性使得大型企业从更便宜的IT资本中获益最多。其次，由于大型商业服务企业集中在密集城市，IT价格下降产生了偏向城市的增长。通过使用企业层面数据对这一机制进行约束，我们发现，观察到的IT价格下降大约解释了工资-密度梯度增加的75%。
30515.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：J3, O33, R11, R12

30514.title: Imperfect Competition and Sanitation: Evidence from Randomized Auctions in Senegal
30514.zh_title: 不完全竞争与卫生设施：来自塞内加尔随机拍卖的证据
30514.authors: Jean-François Houde, Terence R. Johnson, Molly Lipscomb, Laura A. Schechter
30514.abstract: We study the extent to which collusion can explain the under-provision of clean sanitation technologies in developing countries. Using latrine desludging services in Dakar as a case-study, we document that prices are 40% lower in competitive areas than in areas where prices are coordinated by a trade association. We then develop an experimental just-in-time auction platform with random variation in several design features to formally test for collusive conduct and estimate the welfare costs of imperfect competition. Consistent with the collusion hypothesis, we find that bidders systematically avoid competition by placing round focal bids and refraining from undercutting rivals. We use a K-means clustering algorithm to classify bidders as competitive or non-competitive and simulate counterfactuals in which non-competitive bidders are replaced with competitive bidders. This would significantly increase take-up of the improved sanitation technology, with back-of-the-envelope calculations suggesting increased competition would improve health by a half to a quarter as much as would building improved sewerage systems–an often prohibitively expensive and demanding undertaking.
30514.zh_abstract: 我们研究了合谋在多大程度上可以解释发展中国家清洁卫生技术供应不足的问题。以达喀尔的厕所清掏服务为案例，我们记录了竞争区域的价格比由行业协会协调价格的区域低40%。然后，我们开发了一个实验性的即时拍卖平台，其中包含多个设计特征的随机变化，以正式检验合谋行为并估计不完全竞争的福利成本。与合谋假说一致，我们发现竞标者通过报出整数焦点价格并避免压低竞争对手来系统性地规避竞争。我们使用K-means聚类算法将竞标者分类为竞争性或非竞争性，并模拟了用竞争性竞标者替代非竞争性竞标者的反事实情景。这将显著提高改进型卫生技术的采用率，粗略计算表明，增加竞争带来的健康改善效果，相当于建设改进型下水道系统（一项通常成本高昂且要求苛刻的工程）效果的一半到四分之一。

30513.title: Listen to Her: Gender Differences in Information Diffusion within the Household
30513.zh_title: 倾听她的声音：家庭内部信息传播的性别差异
30513.authors: Dietmar Fehr, Johanna Mollerstrom, Ricardo Perez-Truglia
30513.abstract: We study how economic information diffuses within the household, leveraging an information-provision experiment with a representative sample of households from Germany. A random sample of household members received information about their household’s position in the income distribution. When provided with information directly, there are no gender differences in how individuals update their beliefs. However, we observe significant gender disparities in the diffusion of information within the household. Specifically, when only the husband receives the information, it influences the wife’s beliefs; however, when only the wife receives the information, it does not affect the husband’s beliefs.
30513.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项针对德国家庭代表性样本的信息提供实验，研究了经济信息如何在家庭内部传播。随机抽取的家庭成员收到了关于其家庭在收入分配中位置的信息。当直接提供信息时，个体在更新信念方面不存在性别差异。然而，我们观察到信息在家庭内部传播中存在显著的性别差异。具体而言，当只有丈夫收到信息时，它会影响妻子的信念；然而，当只有妻子收到信息时，它不会影响丈夫的信念。

30512.title: Excess Death Rates for Republicans and Democrats During the COVID-19 Pandemic
30512.zh_title: 新冠疫情期间共和党人与民主党人的超额死亡率
30512.authors: Jacob Wallace, Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Jason L. Schwartz
30512.abstract: Political affiliation has emerged as a potential risk factor for COVID-19, amid evidence that Republican-leaning counties have had higher COVID-19 death rates than Democrat- leaning counties and evidence of a link between political party affiliation and vaccination views. This study constructs an individual-level dataset with political affiliation and excess death rates during the COVID-19 pandemic via a linkage of 2017 voter registration in Ohio and Florida to mortality data from 2018 to 2021. We estimate substantially higher excess death rates for registered Republicans when compared to registered Democrats, with almost all of the difference concentrated in the period after vaccines were widely available in our study states. Overall, the excess death rate for Republicans was 5.4 percentage points (pp), or 76%, higher than the excess death rate for Democrats. Post- vaccines, the excess death rate gap between Republicans and Democrats widened from 1.6 pp (22% of the Democrat excess death rate) to 10.4 pp (153% of the Democrat excess death rate). The gap in excess death rates between Republicans and Democrats is concentrated in counties with low vaccination rates and only materializes after vaccines became widely available.
30512.zh_abstract: 政治归属已成为新冠肺炎的潜在风险因素，有证据表明倾向共和党的县的新冠肺炎死亡率高于倾向民主党的县，且政党归属与疫苗接种观点之间存在关联。本研究通过将2017年俄亥俄州和佛罗里达州的选民登记数据与2018年至2021年的死亡率数据相关联，构建了一个包含政治归属和新冠疫情期间超额死亡率的个体层面数据集。我们发现，与注册民主党人相比，注册共和党人的超额死亡率显著更高，几乎所有差异都集中在疫苗在我们研究州广泛可用之后的时期。总体而言，共和党人的超额死亡率比民主党人高出5.4个百分点（pp），即76%。疫苗普及后，共和党人与民主党人之间的超额死亡率差距从1.6个百分点（占民主党超额死亡率的22%）扩大到10.4个百分点（占民主党超额死亡率的153%）。共和党人与民主党人之间的超额死亡率差距集中在疫苗接种率低的县，并且仅在疫苗广泛可用后才显现出来。

30511.title: Culture in Historical Political Economy
30511.zh_title: 历史政治经济学中的文化
30511.abstract: Culture – the set of socially transmitted values and beliefs held by individuals – has important implications for a wide variety of economic outcomes. Both the causes and consequences of culture have been the subject of work in Historical Political Economy. I first outline several theories on the origins, evolution, and transmission of culture. I then discuss various strategies for measuring culture. Finally, I review recent research in HPE that explores the origins of variation in culture and the economic consequences of culture.
30511.zh_abstract: 文化——个体所持有的社会性传递的价值观和信仰集合——对广泛的经济结果具有重要影响。文化的成因和后果都是历史政治经济学研究的主题。我首先概述了关于文化起源、演变和传播的几种理论。然后，我讨论了衡量文化的各种策略。最后，我回顾了近期历史政治经济学领域的研究，这些研究探讨了文化差异的起源以及文化的经济后果。

30510.title: Gender Gaps at the Academies
30510.authors: David Card, Stefano DellaVigna, Patricia Funk, Nagore Iriberri
30510.abstract: Historically, a large majority of the newly elected members of the National Academy of Science (NAS) and the American Academy of Arts and Science (AAAS) were men. Within the past two decades, however, that situation has changed, and in the last 3 years women made up about 40 percent of the new members in both academies. We build lists of active scholars from publications in the top journals in three fields – Psychology, Mathematics and Economics – and develop a series of models to compare changes in the probability of selection of women as members of the NAS and AAAS from the 1960s to today, controlling for publications and citations. In the early years of our sample, women were less likely to be selected as members than men with similar records. By the 1990s, the selection process at both academies was approximately gender-neutral, conditional on publications and citations. In the past 20 years, however, a positive preference for female members has emerged and strengthened in all three fields. Currently, women are 3-15 times more likely to be selected as members of the AAAS and NAS than men with similar publication and citation records.
30510.zh_abstract: 历史上，新当选的美国国家科学院和美国艺术与科学院的成员绝大多数是男性。然而，在过去二十年里，这种情况发生了变化，在最近三年中，女性在这两个科学院的新成员中约占40%。我们根据三个领域——心理学、数学和经济学——顶级期刊的出版物构建了活跃学者名单，并开发了一系列模型，以比较从1960年代至今女性被选为美国国家科学院和美国艺术与科学院成员的概率变化，同时控制出版物和引用次数。在我们样本的早期年份，与记录相似的男性相比，女性被选为成员的可能性较低。到1990年代，在控制出版物和引用次数的条件下，两个科学院的选拔过程大致是性别中性的。然而，在过去20年中，对所有三个领域而言，对女性成员的正面偏好已经出现并加强。目前，与具有相似出版物和引用记录的男性相比，女性被选为美国艺术与科学院和美国国家科学院成员的可能性高出3到15倍。
30510.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：J15, J16, O30

30509.title: Kinship Structure and the Family: Evidence from the Matrilineal Belt
30509.zh_title: 亲属结构与家庭：来自母系带的证据
30509.abstract: Kinship structure varies across societies and may affect incentives for cooperation within the household. A key source of variation in kinship structure is whether lineage and inheritance are traced through women, as in matrilineal kinship systems, or men, as in patrilineal kinship systems. Anthropologists hypothesize that matrilineal kinship benefits women because they have greater support from their kin and husbands have less authority over their wives. However, these factors may reduce cooperation within the nuclear household. I test these hypotheses using a geographic regression discontinuity design along the matrilineal belt, which describes the distribution of matrilineal kinship across sub-Saharan Africa. Using over 50 DHS survey-waves with more than 400,000 respondents, I find that matrilineal women are less likely to believe domestic violence is justified, experience less domestic violence, and have greater autonomy in decision making – particularly in the ability to visit family and seek healthcare. Additionally, matrilineal kinship closes the education gap between male and female children, and matrilineal children experience health benefits. Using original survey and experimental data from couples along the matrilineal belt, I test how matrilineal kinship structure affects spousal cooperation. Matrilineal women contribute less to a public good with a spouse when it is easier to hide income. The results highlight how broader social structures shape women’s empowerment, investment in children, and cooperation in the household.
30509.zh_abstract: 亲属结构在不同社会中存在差异，并可能影响家庭内部的合作激励。亲属结构的一个关键差异来源是世系和继承是通过女性（如母系亲属制度）还是男性（如父系亲属制度）来追溯。人类学家假设母系亲属制度对女性有利，因为她们从亲属那里获得更多支持，且丈夫对妻子的权威较小。然而，这些因素可能减少核心家庭内部的合作。我利用沿母系带的地理断点回归设计来检验这些假设，母系带描述了撒哈拉以南非洲母系亲属制度的分布。使用超过50次人口与健康调查波次、超过40万受访者的数据，我发现母系女性更不可能认为家庭暴力是正当的，经历更少的家庭暴力，并在决策方面拥有更大的自主权——尤其是在探访家人和寻求医疗保健的能力上。此外，母系亲属制度缩小了男女儿童之间的教育差距，并且母系儿童在健康方面受益。利用从母系带夫妇处收集的原始调查和实验数据，我检验了母系亲属制度如何影响配偶合作。当更容易隐藏收入时，母系女性与配偶在公共物品上的贡献更少。这些结果突显了更广泛的社会结构如何塑造女性赋权、对子女的投资以及家庭内部的合作。
30509.meta: Programs：DEV, PE；JEL：D13, J16, N47, P5, Z13

30508.title: Buy Now, Pay Later Credit: User Characteristics and Effects on Spending Patterns
30508.zh_title: 先买后付信贷：用户特征及对消费模式的影响
30508.authors: Marco Di Maggio, Emily Williams, Justin Katz
30508.abstract: Firms offering “buy now, pay later” (BNPL) point-of-sale installment loans with minimal underwriting and low interest have captured a growing fraction of the market for short-term unsecured consumer credit. We provide a detailed look into the US BNPL market by constructing a large panel of BNPL users from transaction-level data. We document characteristics of users and usage patterns, and use BNPL roll-out to provide new insights into consumer responses to unsecured credit access. BNPL access increases both total spending levels and the retail share in total spending, with magnitudes too large for standard intertemporal and static substitution effects to explain. These findings hold for consumers with and without inferred liquidity constraints. Our findings are more consistent with a “liquidity flypaper effect” where additional retail liquidity through BNPL “sticks where it hits”, than a standard lifecycle model with liquidity constraints.
30508.zh_abstract: 提供“先买后付”销售点分期贷款的公司，其贷款审批要求极低且利率低，已占据了短期无担保消费信贷市场日益增长的份额。我们通过从交易层面数据构建一个大型的“先买后付”用户面板，详细审视了美国“先买后付”市场。我们记录了用户特征和使用模式，并利用“先买后付”的推出为消费者对无担保信贷获取的反应提供了新见解。“先买后付”的获取增加了总消费水平以及零售支出在总消费中的占比，其幅度之大，标准跨期和静态替代效应无法解释。这些发现对于推断有和没有流动性约束的消费者均成立。我们的发现更符合“流动性粘蝇纸效应”，即通过“先买后付”增加的零售流动性“粘在它触及的地方”，而不是带有流动性约束的标准生命周期模型。

30507.title: Three Criteria for Evaluating Social Programs
30507.zh_title: 评估社会项目的三个标准
30507.authors: Jorge Luis García, James J. Heckman
30507.abstract: This paper examines the economic foundations of three criteria used for evaluating the costs and benefits of social programs. Some criteria do not consider the scale of programs or address the costs associated with programs that expand or contract the total government budget. A recent addition to the list of evaluation criteria--the marginal value of public funds (MVPF)--does not adopt a social optimality perspective. It evaluates the optimality of expenditures assuming a predetermined aggregate budget without considering the social costs of raising that budget.
30507.zh_abstract: 本文考察了用于评估社会项目成本和收益的三个标准的经济学基础。一些标准不考虑项目的规模，也不处理那些扩大或缩小政府总预算的项目所带来的成本。评估标准列表中的一个最新补充——公共资金边际价值——并未采用社会最优性视角。它在假设总预算预先确定且不考虑筹集该预算的社会成本的情况下评估支出的最优性。

30506.title: Trapped in the Trilemma: When Security Trumps Economics
30506.zh_title: 困于三难困境：当安全压倒经济
30506.abstract: This paper describes the challenges of globalization in terms of the logic underpinning four distinct policy constraints or “trilemmas” and their interrelationship; in particular the disturbances that arise from capital flows and the difficulties of adjusting monetary policies to a global monetary environment. These trilemmas intersect and interlock. The trilemmas are: 1. The traditional Macroeconomic trilemma between capital mobility, fixed exchange rates and monetary autonomy; 2. The International relations trilemma between capital mobility, sovereignty and international order; 3. The Political economy trilemma between capital mobility, democracy and sovereignty; 4. The Financial stability trilemma between capital mobility, financial stability and independent national policies. The four trilemmas offer a way to analyze how domestic monetary, financial, economic and political systems are interconnected within the international system that opens up vulnerabilities. They can be described as the impossible policy choices at the heart of globalization.
30506.zh_abstract: 本文根据支撑四种不同政策约束或“三难困境”的逻辑及其相互关系，描述了全球化的挑战；特别是资本流动引起的扰动以及调整货币政策以适应全球货币环境的困难。这些三难困境相互交叉和锁定。这些三难困境是：1. 传统的宏观经济三难困境：资本流动性、固定汇率和货币自主权之间；2. 国际关系三难困境：资本流动性、主权和国际秩序之间；3. 政治经济三难困境：资本流动性、民主和主权之间；4. 金融稳定三难困境：资本流动性、金融稳定和独立国家政策之间。这四个三难困境提供了一种分析国内货币、金融、经济和政治体系如何在国际体系内相互关联的方式，这种关联打开了脆弱性。它们可以被描述为全球化核心中不可能的政策选择。
30506.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E52, E60, F30, F40, G28, N1

30505.title: Firming up Price Inflation
30505.authors: Philip Bunn, Lena S. Anayi, Nicholas Bloom, Paul Mizen, Gregory Thwaites, Ivan Yotzov
30505.abstract: We use data from a large panel survey of UK firms to analyze the economic drivers of price setting since the start of the Covid pandemic. Inflation responded asymmetrically to movements in demand. This helps to explain why inflation did not fall much during the negative initial pandemic demand shock. Energy prices and shortages of labor and materials account for most of the rise during the rebound. Inflation rates across firms have become more dispersed and skewed since the start of the pandemic. We find that average price inflation is positively correlated with the dispersion and skewness of the distribution. Finally, we also introduce a novel measure of subjective inflation uncertainty within firms and show how this has increased during the pandemic, continuing to rise in 2022 even as sales uncertainty dropped back.
30505.zh_abstract: 我们利用英国企业大型面板调查的数据，分析了自新冠疫情开始以来价格设定的经济驱动因素。通胀对需求变动的反应是不对称的。这有助于解释为什么在疫情初期负面的需求冲击期间通胀没有大幅下降。能源价格以及劳动力和材料短缺解释了反弹期间通胀上升的大部分原因。自疫情开始以来，企业间的通胀率变得更加分散和偏斜。我们发现平均价格通胀与分布的离散度和偏度呈正相关。最后，我们还引入了一种衡量企业内部主观通胀不确定性的新方法，并展示了这种不确定性在疫情期间如何增加，即使在2022年销售不确定性回落时仍继续上升。

30544.title: All Clear for Takeoff: Evidence from Airports on the Effects of Infrastructure Privatization
30544.zh_title: 起飞畅通无阻：来自机场的基础设施私有化效应证据
30544.authors: Sabrina T. Howell, Yeejin Jang, Hyeik Kim, Michael S. Weisbach
30544.abstract: Infrastructure assets have undergone substantial privatization around the world in recent decades. How do these assets perform post-privatization? This paper examines global airports. Our central finding is that the type of ownership matters: Volume, efficiency, and quality improve substantially under private equity (PE) ownership—both following privatization and in subsequent transactions—but there is little evidence of improvement under non-PE private ownership. This remains the case for airports sold in auctions in which PE and non-PE firms bid, mitigating concerns about selection. PE owners invest in new physical capacity and appear to negotiate more effectively with airlines, especially in the presence of a state-owned flag carrier. Higher prices and more retail revenue increase net income, with no evidence of cost reductions or layoffs. We find that improvements are concentrated when there is a competing airport nearby, under longer-term leases, and when the local government is less corrupt. One explanation for the failure of non-PE private firms to outperform government ownership is that they tend to target more corrupt locations.
30544.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，全球基础设施资产经历了大规模私有化。这些资产在私有化后表现如何？本文考察了全球机场。我们的核心发现是，所有权类型至关重要：在私募股权所有权下——无论是在私有化之后还是在后续交易中——运量、效率和质量都显著改善，但几乎没有证据表明非私募股权私人所有权下有所改善。对于私募股权和非私募股权公司竞标的拍卖中出售的机场，情况依然如此，这缓解了对选择问题的担忧。私募股权所有者投资于新的物理容量，并且似乎在与航空公司谈判时更有效，尤其是在存在国有旗舰航空公司的情况下。更高的价格和更多的零售收入增加了净收入，没有证据表明成本降低或裁员。我们发现，当附近有竞争机场、租约期限较长以及当地政府腐败程度较低时，改善更为集中。非私募股权私人公司未能超越政府所有权的一个解释是，它们倾向于瞄准更腐败的地点。
30544.meta: Programs：CF, PE, POL, PR；JEL：G32, G38, H54, L32, R42

30543.title: Heterogenous Rates of Return on Homes and Other Real Estate: Do the Rich Do Better? Do Black Households Do Worse?
30543.zh_title: 住房及其他房地产的异质性回报率：富人表现更好吗？黑人家庭表现更差吗？
30543.abstract: Recent work on wealth inequality based on the capitalization method wherein aggregate wealth totals are distributed in proportion to various forms of income like dividends has motivated a concern about whether rates of return on assets vary across the wealth distribution. In this study, I use a new data source, accrued capital gains on homes and other real estate as reported in the Survey of Consumer Finances. I find strong econometric evidence that returns on homes vary directly with wealth level and are considerably higher for the very wealthy compared to the middle class and lower wealth households. However, there is no evidence from the preferred specification that Black or Hispanic families receive lower returns on their property once controlling for factors such as years of occupancy and overall house price movements in the market. The number of years of occupancy is also a highly significant determinant of returns on homes. The effect is strongly negative because communities of residence become less desirable and real properties deteriorate physically over time, both factors reducing property values. Returns on individual homes are also strongly related to overall house price movements in the market, suggesting that timing the market is a key determinant.
30543.zh_abstract: 近期基于资本化方法（即总财富总量按股息等各种收入形式比例分配）研究财富不平等的工作，引发了对资产回报率是否随财富分布而变化的关注。在本研究中，我使用了一个新的数据来源，即消费者金融调查中报告的住房及其他房地产的应计资本收益。我发现了强有力的计量经济学证据，表明住房回报率与财富水平直接相关，且非常富裕家庭的回报率远高于中产阶级和较低财富家庭。然而，在控制了居住年限和市场整体房价变动等因素后，首选设定中没有证据表明黑人家庭或西班牙裔家庭的房产回报率较低。居住年限也是住房回报率的一个高度显著的决定因素。其效应为强负向，因为居住社区随时间推移变得不那么理想，且实物资产会物理性贬值，这两个因素都会降低房产价值。个人住房回报率也与市场整体房价变动密切相关，这表明把握市场时机是一个关键决定因素。

30542.title: Multidimensional Screening and Menu Design in Health Insurance Markets
30542.zh_title: 健康保险市场中的多维筛选与菜单设计
30542.authors: Hector Chade, Victoria R. Marone, Amanda Starc, Jeroen Swinkels
30542.abstract: We study a general screening model that encompasses the problem facing a price-setting insurer offering vertically differentiated contracts to consumers with multiple dimensions of private information. We show how even with minimal assumptions on consumer valuations and costs, progress can be made to understand the solution in two ways. First, we derive conditions that any optimal menu must satisfy, and show how they can be used to shed light on insurer incentives. Second, we propose a tractable method to approximate the solution, and show how the quality of the approximation can be ex-post evaluated in any practical application. Applying our method empirically in the context of health insurance, we find that the approximation comes within one percent of the true solution. We illustrate the usefulness of the approximation for understanding the solution graphically as well as for numerically evaluating optimal policy interventions in a monopoly market. Our analysis highlights the importance of strategic insurer responses and endogenous contract characteristics in evaluating the effects of policy in these markets.
30542.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个一般性的筛选模型，该模型涵盖了定价保险公司向拥有多维私人信息的消费者提供纵向差异化合约时所面临的问题。我们展示了即使在关于消费者估值和成本的最少假设下，也能通过两种方式取得进展以理解解决方案。首先，我们推导出任何最优菜单必须满足的条件，并展示这些条件如何用于阐明保险公司的激励。其次，我们提出了一种易于处理的方法来近似求解，并展示了在实际应用中如何事后评估近似的质量。在健康保险背景下实证应用我们的方法时，我们发现近似解与真实解的误差在百分之一以内。我们通过图形方式说明了该近似对于理解解决方案的用处，以及用于数值评估垄断市场中最优政策干预的用处。我们的分析强调了在这些市场中评估政策效果时，考虑保险公司战略反应和内生合约特征的重要性。

30541.title: Coordination and Incumbency Advantage in Multi-Party Systems - Evidence from French Elections
30541.zh_title: 多党制中的协调与在位优势——来自法国选举的证据
30541.authors: Kevin Dano, Francesco Ferlenga, Vincenzo Galasso, Caroline Le Pennec, Vincent Pons
30541.abstract: In theory, free and fair elections can improve the selection of politicians and incentivize them to exert effort. In practice, incumbency advantage and coordination issues may lead to the (re)election of bad politicians. We ask whether these two forces compound each other. Using a regression discontinuity design in French two-round local and parliamentary elections, we find that winning an election increases candidates' chances to win the next election by 25.1 percentage points. Close winners are more likely to run again and more likely to win, conditional on running, than close losers. Incumbents personalize their campaign communication more and face fewer ideologically close competitors, indicating that parties coordinate more effectively on the winning side than on the losing side. A complementary RDD reveals that marginally qualifying for the runoff also enables candidates to rally new voters, but does not affect the number of competitors on their side. We conclude that party coordination and voters rallying candidates who won or gained visibility in an election both contribute to their success in future races, even absent any actual difference in quality with candidates on the losing side.
30541.zh_abstract: 理论上，自由公正的选举可以改善政治家的选拔并激励他们付出努力。实践中，在位优势和协调问题可能导致糟糕的政治家（再次）当选。我们探究这两种力量是否相互叠加。利用法国两轮地方和议会选举中的断点回归设计，我们发现赢得选举会使候选人赢得下一次选举的概率提高25.1个百分点。与落败的接近获胜者相比，接近获胜者更有可能再次参选，并且在参选条件下更有可能获胜。在位者更倾向于个性化其竞选沟通，并且面临的意识形态相近的竞争者更少，这表明政党在获胜方比在落败方协调得更为有效。一项补充性的断点回归设计显示，勉强进入第二轮投票也使候选人能够吸引新选民，但不会影响其所在阵营的竞争者数量。我们得出结论，即使与落败方的候选人不存在任何实际质量差异，政党协调以及选民对赢得选举或获得可见度的候选人的支持，都共同促进了他们在未来选举中的成功。

30540.title: Inequality and Social Distancing during the Pandemic
30540.zh_title: 疫情前的不平等与疫情期间的社交距离
30540.abstract: We study how pre-pandemic inequalities in America influenced social distancing over the course of the COVID-19 pandemic. Richer counties tended to see more protective mobility responses in the initial (pre-pharmaceutical) phase, but less protective responses later. Near linearity of this income effect implies that inequality between counties contributed very little to overall mobility reductions. By contrast, higher within-county inequality and/or poverty measures came with substantially larger attenuations to non-residential mobility at given average incomes. There were also significant effects of the county’s racial and age composition. Standard epidemiological covariates of contact rates were also relevant, controlling for the socioeconomic factors.
30540.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国疫情前的不平等如何影响COVID-19疫情期间的社交距离行为。在初始（药物前）阶段，较富裕的县往往表现出更具保护性的流动性反应，但后期则相反。这种收入效应的近乎线性意味着县际不平等对整体流动性减少的贡献非常小。相比之下，在给定平均收入水平下，较高的县内不平等和/或贫困指标与非居住流动性的显著更大衰减相关。县的种族和年龄构成也有显著影响。在控制社会经济因素后，接触率的标准流行病学协变量也具有相关性。

30539.title: Does the Squeaky Wheel Get More Grease? The Direct and Indirect Effects of Citizen Participation on Environmental Governance in China
30539.zh_title: 会哭的孩子有奶吃？公民参与对中国环境治理的直接与间接影响
30539.authors: Mark Buntaine, Michael Greenstone, Guojun He, Mengdi Liu, Shaoda Wang, Bing Zhang
30539.abstract: We conducted a nationwide field experiment in China to evaluate the direct and indirect impacts of assigning firms to public or private citizen appeals when they violate pollution standards. There are three main findings. First, public appeals to the regulator through social media substantially reduce violations and pollution emissions, while private appeals cause more modest environmental improvements. Second, public appeals appear to tilt regulators’ focus away from facilitating economic growth and toward avoiding pollution-induced public unrest. Third, pollution reductions by treated firms are not offset by control firms, based on randomly varying the proportion of treatment firms at the prefecture-level.
30539.zh_abstract: 我们在中国进行了一项全国性实地实验，以评估当企业违反污染标准时，将企业分配给公众或私人公民申诉的直接和间接影响。主要有三个发现。首先，通过社交媒体向监管机构进行公开申诉显著减少了违规行为和污染排放，而私人申诉则带来较为温和的环境改善。其次，公开申诉似乎使监管机构的关注点从促进经济增长转向避免污染引发的公众不安。第三，基于在地级市层面随机改变处理组企业比例，处理组企业的污染减少并未被对照组企业所抵消。
30539.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, LE, PE, POL；JEL：K32, P28, Q52

30538.title: Micro Propagation and Macro Aggregation
30538.abstract: This paper reviews a framework for studying the aggregation and propagation of microeconomic shocks in general equilibrium. We discuss the determinants of aggregate measures of real economic activity, like real GDP, real domestic absorption, and aggregate productivity in both efficient and inefficient environments. We also discuss how shocks from one set of producers are transmitted to other producers through prices and quantities. The framework we provide is amenable to generalization and can be used to study any collection of producers ranging from one isolated producer, to an industry consisting of heterogeneous producers, to an entire economy. We conclude with a brief survey of some of the applied questions that can be addressed using the analytical tools presented in this review and avenues for future work.
30538.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了一个研究一般均衡中微观经济冲击的加总和传导的框架。我们讨论了在有效和无效环境中，实际经济活动（如实际GDP、实际国内吸收和总生产率）的总体衡量指标的决定因素。我们还讨论了来自一组生产者的冲击如何通过价格和数量传导给其他生产者。我们提供的框架易于推广，可用于研究任何生产者集合，范围从单个孤立的生产者，到由异质性生产者组成的行业，再到整个经济体。最后，我们简要概述了使用本文所述分析工具可以解决的一些应用问题以及未来工作的方向。

30537.title: Inflation Expectations and Corporate Borrowing Decisions: New Causal Evidence
30537.zh_title: 通胀预期与企业借贷决策：新的因果证据
30537.authors: Tiziano Ropele, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion
30537.abstract: We match survey data of Italian firms that includes a repeated experiment in which information about inflation is randomly provided to firms over time with detailed credit data that covers the borrowing decisions of firms. This allows us to study how exogenous variation in inflation expectations causally affects the borrowing decisions of Italian firms. We document a number of new results. Firms with exogenously higher inflation expectations end up paying higher interest rates on average but do not change the overall demand of loans. Instead, we find a significant rebalancing of firms’ borrowing decisions away from lower-interest long-term loans and toward higher-interest short-term loans. In anticipation of rising future interest rates linked to higher expected inflation, firms also take on new long-term loans to pay down existing loans, thereby locking in interest rate savings. Firms that are relatively more knowledgeable about financial tools engage in the latter particularly strongly.
30537.zh_abstract: 我们将意大利企业的调查数据（其中包含一项重复实验，随时间随机向企业提供关于通胀的信息）与涵盖企业借贷决策的详细信贷数据相匹配。这使我们能够研究通胀预期的外生变化如何因果性地影响意大利企业的借贷决策。我们记录了一系列新结果。通胀预期外生较高的企业平均支付了更高的利率，但并未改变贷款的总需求。相反，我们发现企业的借贷决策发生了显著再平衡，从低利率的长期贷款转向高利率的短期贷款。由于预期未来利率会随着预期通胀上升而上升，企业还借入新的长期贷款来偿还现有贷款，从而锁定利率节省。对金融工具相对更了解的企业尤其强烈地参与了后一种行为。

30536.title: Jobs in the Smog: Firm Location and Workers’ Exposure to Pollution in African Cities
30536.zh_title: 雾霾中的工作：非洲城市的企业选址与工人污染暴露
30536.authors: Vittorio Bassi, Matthew E. Kahn, Nancy Lozano Gracia, Tommaso Porzio, Jeanne Sorin
30536.abstract: We show that the organization of production prevalent in Ugandan cities increases workers’ exposure to urban pollution. Using new granular spatial data on air pollution and manufacturing firms, we document that small firms cluster along the busiest and most polluted roads because road traffic bundles air pollution with customer access. Even within neighborhoods, cleaner areas exist, yet jobs are in the smog. A spatial equilibrium model rationalizes these patterns, with firms capturing sizable profit gains from polluted locations while workers receive limited compensation for the exposure. Our results imply that the welfare costs of urban air pollution in developing-country cities may be substantially larger than city-level averages suggest.
30536.zh_abstract: 我们表明，乌干达城市普遍存在的生产组织方式增加了工人对城市污染的暴露。利用关于空气污染和制造业企业的新颖精细空间数据，我们记录了小型企业聚集在最繁忙、污染最严重的道路沿线，因为道路交通将空气污染与客户可达性捆绑在一起。即使在社区内部也存在更清洁的区域，但工作机会却在雾霾之中。一个空间均衡模型使这些模式合理化，企业从污染地点获得了可观的利润收益，而工人则因暴露而获得的补偿有限。我们的结果表明，发展中国家城市中城市空气污染的福利成本可能远大于城市平均水平所暗示的程度。

30535.title: Informationally Efficient Climate Policy: Designing Markets to Measure and Price Externalities
30535.zh_title: 信息有效的气候政策：设计市场以衡量和定价外部性
30535.abstract: I study how policymakers can access and act on the information about climate change damages that is dispersed throughout the economy. I analyze a new dynamic deposit-refund instrument that I label “carbon shares”. This instrument empowers markets to perform price discovery about future damages. I show that there exists a limit-case rational expectations equilibrium in which this instrument: i) efficiently prices new emissions, ii) efficiently incentivizes removal of past emissions, and iii) efficiently aggregates dispersed information about the social cost of emissions. Conventional emission taxes achieve only the first of these objectives, for given information. Calibrated numerical simulations suggest benefits from achieving the other two objectives.
30535.zh_abstract: 我研究了政策制定者如何获取并利用分散在整个经济中的关于气候变化损害的信息。我分析了一种新的动态押金-退款工具，我将其称为“碳份额”。该工具使市场能够对未来损害进行价格发现。我证明存在一个极限情况下的理性预期均衡，在该均衡中，这一工具能够：i) 有效定价新排放，ii) 有效激励清除历史排放，以及iii) 有效加总关于排放社会成本的分散信息。传统的排放税在给定信息下仅能实现第一个目标。校准后的数值模拟表明，实现另外两个目标会带来收益。
30535.meta: Programs：EEE, PE；JEL：D82, G14, H23, Q54, Q58

30534.title: Comparing the Effects of Policies for the Labor Market Integration of Refugees
30534.zh_title: 比较难民劳动力市场融合政策的效果
30534.authors: Mette Foged, Linea Hasager, Giovanni Peri
30534.abstract: This paper estimates, within a common framework, the effects of four types of integration polices on the employment probability and earnings of refugees in Denmark during the last three decades. We first review the studies that use a credible identification strategy to evaluate the causal effects of these types of policies on the assimilation of refugees in developed countries. We then describe the dynamics of labor market outcomes of several cohorts of refugees in Denmark. To our knowledge, Denmark is the only country where the number and design of policy changes and the longitudinal individual data availability make such an analysis possible. Our analysis suggests that improved language training, combined with initial placement of refugees in strong labor markets, significantly improved their long-run labor market outcomes. On the contrary, cutting initial welfare payments and housing them near other refugees does not seem to improve their long-run outcomes. Active labor market policies focused on matching refugees with simple jobs in high demand occupations may have positive short-run effects, but we cannot yet assess their long-run effects.
30534.zh_abstract: 本文在一个统一框架内，估计了过去三十年间四类融合政策对丹麦难民就业概率和收入的影响。我们首先回顾了那些采用可信识别策略来评估这些政策类型对发达国家难民融入的因果效应的研究。然后，我们描述了丹麦几批难民群体劳动力市场结果的动态变化。据我们所知，丹麦是唯一一个政策变化数量、设计以及纵向个体数据可得性使得此类分析成为可能的国家。我们的分析表明，改进的语言培训，结合将难民初始安置在强劲的劳动力市场，显著改善了他们的长期劳动力市场结果。相反，削减初始福利金并将他们安置在其他难民附近，似乎并未改善其长期结果。侧重于将难民与高需求职业中的简单工作进行匹配的积极劳动力市场政策可能产生积极的短期效应，但我们尚无法评估其长期效应。

30533.title: The Effects of Income on the Economic Wellbeing of Families with Low Incomes: Evidence from the 2021 Expanded Child Tax Credit
30533.zh_title: 收入对低收入家庭经济福祉的影响：来自2021年扩大的儿童税收抵免的证据
30533.authors: Natasha Pilkauskas, Katherine Michelmore, Nicole Kovski, H. Luke Shaefer
30533.abstract: We examine the effects of an unconditional cash transfer on the economic wellbeing (material hardship, ability to meet needs, money on hand, use of friends and family for assistance, and employment) of families and children with very low incomes. We use a parameterized difference-in-differences approach to study the impact of the 2021 temporary expansion of the Child Tax Credit (CTC), which provided monthly, unconditional cash payments to families with children from July to December 2021. The 2021 monthly CTC reduced the number of hardships families experienced, and in particular their food insecurity. We find some evidence that the credit reduced medical hardships, reduced reliance on friends and family for food, and improved respondents’ ability to pay utility bills. We also find no effects on any labor supply measures. Analyses that examine differences by racial/ethnic groups show that the effects are somewhat stronger for Black families than for Hispanic and White families, but the differences are not large.
30533.zh_abstract: 我们研究了无条件现金转移支付对极低收入家庭和儿童的经济福祉（物质困难、满足需求的能力、手头现金、向亲友寻求帮助以及就业）的影响。我们采用参数化双重差分法来研究2021年儿童税收抵免（CTC）临时扩大的影响，该扩大在2021年7月至12月期间向有子女的家庭提供了每月无条件现金支付。2021年的月度CTC减少了家庭经历的困难数量，特别是其粮食不安全状况。我们找到一些证据表明，该抵免减少了医疗困难，减少了对亲友提供食物的依赖，并提高了受访者支付水电费的能力。我们也没有发现对任何劳动力供给指标有影响。按种族/民族群体分析差异表明，对黑人家庭的影响略强于对西班牙裔和白人家庭的影响，但差异并不大。
30533.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：H20, I3, I30, I31, I38, J20

30532.title: The Impacts of COVID-19 on Racial Inequality in Business Earnings
30532.zh_title: COVID-19对商业收入种族不平等的影响
30532.abstract: Many small businesses have closed, lost revenues, or downsized as a response to health and economic disruptions caused by COVID-19. But, were economic losses in the pandemic disproportionately felt by businesses owned by people of color? This paper provides the first study of the impacts of COVID-19 on racial inequality in business earnings. Pandemic-induced losses to business earnings in 2020 were 16-19 percent for all business owners. Racial inequality increased in the pandemic: Black business owners experienced larger negative impacts on business earnings of 12-14 percent relative to white business owners. Regression estimates for Latinx and Asian business owners reveal negative point estimates but the estimates are not statistically significant. Using Blinder-Oaxaca decompositions and a new pandemic-focused decomposition technique, I find that the industry concentrations of Black, Latinx, and Asian business owners placed each of these groups at a higher risk of experiencing disproportionate business earnings losses in the pandemic. Higher education levels among Asian business owners helped insulate them from larger losses from COVID-19. Finally, differential exposure to COVID case rates, business closure policies, and mask mandates did not contribute to racial inequality in business earnings losses.
30532.zh_abstract: 许多小企业因应对COVID-19造成的健康和经济冲击而关闭、收入损失或裁员。但是，疫情中的经济损失是否不成比例地由有色人种拥有的企业承担？本文首次研究了COVID-19对商业收入种族不平等的影响。2020年，所有企业主因疫情导致的商业收入损失为16-19%。种族不平等在疫情中加剧：与白人企业主相比，黑人企业主的商业收入受到的负面冲击更大，高出12-14%。对拉丁裔和亚裔企业主的回归估计显示负的点估计，但估计值在统计上不显著。使用Blinder-Oaxaca分解和一种新的疫情聚焦分解技术，我发现黑人、拉丁裔和亚裔企业主的行业集中度使这些群体在疫情中面临更高的不成比例商业收入损失风险。亚裔企业主较高的教育水平有助于他们免受COVID-19带来的更大损失。最后，COVID病例率、企业关闭政策和口罩令的差异化暴露并未导致商业收入损失中的种族不平等。

30531.title: Dust to Feed, Dust to Grey: The Effect of In-Utero Exposure to the Dust Bowl on Old-Age Longevity
30531.zh_title: 尘土为食，尘土为灰：子宫内暴露于沙尘暴对老年寿命的影响
30531.abstract: Intensive agriculture and deep plowing resulted in top-soil erosion and dust storms during the 1930s. These effects have been shown to affect agricultural income and land values that persisted for years. Given the growing literature on the relevance of in-utero and early-life exposures, it is surprising that studies focusing on links between the Dust Bowl and later-life health find inconclusive and mixed results. This paper re-evaluates this literature and studies the long-term effects of in-utero and early-life exposure to top-soil erosion caused by the Dust Bowl of the 1930s on old-age longevity. Specifically, we employ Social Security Administration death records linked with the full-count 1940 census and implement event studies and difference-in-difference designs to compare the longevity of individuals in high/medium versus low top-soil erosion counties post-1930 versus pre-1930. We find intent-to-treat reductions in longevity of about 0.9 months for those born in high erosion counties post-1930. We show that these effects are not an artifact of preexisting trends in longevity. Additional analyses suggest the effects are more pronounced among children raised in farm households, females, and those with lower maternal education. We also provide suggestive evidence that reductions in adulthood income are a likely mechanism channel.
30531.zh_abstract: 20世纪30年代，集约化农业和深耕导致了表土侵蚀和沙尘暴。这些影响已被证明会持续多年影响农业收入和土地价值。鉴于关于子宫内和早期生命暴露相关性的文献日益增多，令人惊讶的是，关注沙尘暴与晚年健康之间联系的研究得出了不确定且混杂的结果。本文重新评估了这些文献，并研究了子宫内和早期生命暴露于20世纪30年代沙尘暴导致的表土侵蚀对老年寿命的长期影响。具体而言，我们使用了与1940年全量人口普查相关联的社会保障局死亡记录，并采用事件研究和双重差分设计，比较了1930年后与1930年前，高/中表土侵蚀县与低表土侵蚀县个体的寿命。我们发现，对于1930年后出生在高侵蚀县的个体，寿命的意向性治疗减少约为0.9个月。我们表明这些效应并非寿命先前趋势的人为产物。进一步分析表明，这种效应在农场家庭长大的儿童、女性和母亲受教育程度较低的人群中更为显著。我们还提供了暗示性证据，表明成年期收入减少是一个可能的机制渠道。
30531.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, EH；JEL：I12, I15, J0

30530.title: A Horse Race of Monetary Policy Regimes: An Experimental Investigation
30530.zh_title: 货币政策体制的赛马：一项实验研究
30530.authors: Olena Kostyshyna, Luba Petersen, Jing Yang
30530.abstract: We provide a comprehensive assessment of leading monetary policy frameworks away from and at the ELB. Inflation targeting, dual mandate, average inflation targeting under 4- and 10-period horizons, price level targeting, and nominal GDP level targeting are evaluated in a laboratory setting. Contrary to theoretical prediction with full information rational expectations, participants exhibit backward-looking expectations and, consequently, rate-targeting mandates outperform level targeting. More history dependence worsens macroeconomic stability. Inflation expectations are managed better when mandates are framed in terms of inflation rates than price levels. Central bank communication significantly improves the performance of price level targeting.
30530.zh_abstract: 我们对远离有效下限（ELB）和处于ELB时的主要货币政策框架进行了全面评估。在实验室环境中评估了通胀目标制、双重使命、4期和10期平均通胀目标制、价格水平目标制和名义GDP水平目标制。与具有完全信息理性预期的理论预测相反，参与者表现出后顾性预期，因此，利率目标制优于水平目标制。更多的历史依赖性会恶化宏观经济稳定性。当使命以通胀率而非价格水平来表述时，通胀预期管理得更好。央行沟通显著改善了价格水平目标制的表现。

30529.title: Comparing China REACH and the Jamaica Home Visiting Program
30529.zh_title: 比较中国REACH项目和牙买加家访项目
30529.authors: Jin Zhou, James J. Heckman, Bei Liu, Mai Lu, Susan M. Chang, Sally Grantham-McGregor
30529.abstract: This paper summarizes empirical findings from a series of recent papers studying a replication of the Jamaica Reach Up and Learn home visiting program in China, China REACH. It collects more detailed information than is available on the original program. An analysis of it facilitates investigation of the skills generated by Jamaica Reach Up and Learn. We find evidence for dynamic complementarity for medium- and low-ability children. Children who start behind only slowly catch up. Able children are an exception. Most children master its goals for skill development, but the pace of learning varies greatly among children classified by ability. The program scales well. Costs per pupil are roughly $\$500$ (2015 USD). At the same ages, treatment effect sizes and skill growth curves are comparable across the Jamaica and China REACH interventions, despite differences in scale and differences in cultural settings. We develop a method for comparing scores on different tests by anchoring comparisons on common items.
30529.zh_abstract: 本文总结了一系列近期论文的实证发现，这些论文研究了牙买加“Reach Up and Learn”家访项目在中国的复制项目——中国REACH。它收集了比原始项目更详细的信息。对其的分析有助于研究牙买加“Reach Up and Learn”项目所产生的技能。我们发现了中低能力儿童存在动态互补性的证据。起步落后的儿童只能缓慢追赶。有能力的儿童是一个例外。大多数儿童掌握了其技能发展目标，但按能力分类的儿童之间学习速度差异很大。该项目扩展性良好。每名学生成本约为500美元（2015年美元）。在相同年龄段，尽管规模和所处文化环境不同，牙买加和中国REACH干预措施的处理效应大小和技能增长曲线具有可比性。我们开发了一种通过将比较锚定在共同项目上来比较不同测试分数的方法。

30570.title: What's My Employee Worth? The Effects of Salary Benchmarking
30570.zh_title: 我的员工值多少钱？薪资基准化的影响
30570.authors: Zoe B. Cullen, Shengwu Li, Ricardo Perez-Truglia
30570.abstract: Firms are allowed to use aggregate data on market salaries to set pay, a practice known as salary benchmarking. Using national payroll data, we study firms that gain access to a tool that reveals market benchmarks for each job title. Using a difference-indifferences design, we find that the benchmark information reduces salary dispersion by 25%. Thus, salary dispersion must stem partly from aggregate uncertainty about the salaries offered by other firms. Our model formalizes how salary dispersion can arise even in competitive labor markets for identical workers when such uncertainty exists, and we discuss implications for an ongoing policy debate.
30570.zh_abstract: 企业被允许使用市场薪资的汇总数据来设定薪酬，这种做法被称为薪资基准化。利用全国薪资数据，我们研究了那些获得一个能揭示每个职位市场基准的工具的企业。采用双重差分设计，我们发现基准信息使薪资离散度降低了25%。因此，薪资离散度必须部分源于其他企业所提供薪资的总体不确定性。我们的模型形式化了即使在同质工人的竞争性劳动力市场中，当存在这种不确定性时，薪资离散度也可能出现，并讨论了对正在进行的政策辩论的启示。

30569.title: The Covid-19 Baby Bump: The Unexpected Increase in U.S. Fertility Rates in Response to the Pandemic
30569.zh_title: 新冠婴儿潮：美国生育率对疫情意外增长的反应
30569.authors: Martha J. Bailey, Janet Currie, Hannes Schwandt
30569.abstract: We use natality microdata covering the universe of U.S. births for 2015-2021 and California births from 2015 through February 2023 to examine childbearing responses to the COVID-19 pandemic. We find that 60% of the 2020 decline in U.S. fertility rates was driven by sharp reductions in births to foreign-born mothers although births to this group comprised only 22% of all U.S. births in 2019. This decline started in January 2020. In contrast, the COVID-19 recession resulted in an overall “baby bump” among U.S.-born mothers which marked the first reversal in declining fertility rates since the Great Recession. Births to U.S.-born mothers fell by 31,000 in 2020 relative to a pre-pandemic trend but increased by 71,000 in 2021. The data for California suggest that U.S. births remained elevated through February 2023. The baby bump was most pronounced for first births and women under age 25, suggesting that the pandemic led some women to start families earlier. Above age 25, the baby bump was most pronounced for women ages 30-34 and women with a college education. The 2021-2022 baby bump is especially remarkable given the large declines in fertility rates that would have been projected by standard statistical models.
30569.zh_abstract: 我们利用覆盖2015-2021年美国全部出生人口和2015年至2023年2月加州出生人口的出生微观数据，考察了生育对COVID-19疫情的反应。我们发现，2020年美国生育率下降的60%是由外国出生母亲生育的急剧减少所驱动，尽管该群体在2019年仅占美国全部出生人口的22%。这一下降始于2020年1月。相比之下，COVID-19衰退导致美国出生母亲总体出现“婴儿潮”，这标志着自大衰退以来生育率下降趋势的首次逆转。相对于疫情前趋势，2020年美国出生母亲的生育减少了31,000例，但2021年增加了71,000例。加州的数据表明，美国出生人口在2023年2月之前仍保持高位。婴儿潮在初产和25岁以下女性中最为显著，表明疫情导致一些女性更早开始组建家庭。在25岁以上，婴儿潮在30-34岁女性和受过大学教育的女性中最为显著。考虑到标准统计模型原本会预测生育率大幅下降，2021-2022年的婴儿潮尤为引人注目。

30568.title: Long Social Distancing
30568.authors: Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis
30568.abstract: Many working-age Americans plan to continue some forms of social distancing after the COVID-19 pandemic ends. We uncover this long social distancing phenomenon in our monthly Survey of Working Arrangements and Attitudes. It is stronger among older persons, the less educated, and those who live with or care for persons at high risk from infectious diseases. Regression models fit to individual-level data suggest that social distancing lowered labor force participation by 2.4 percentage points in 2022, 1.2 points on an earnings-weighted basis. These effects are highly concentrated among persons with long COVID experiences or daily interactions with at-risk persons. When combined with simple equilibrium models, our results imply that the participation drag reduced U.S. output by $\$205$ billion in 2022, shrank the college wage premium by 2.1 percentage points, and modestly steepened the cross-sectional age-wage profile. The social-distancing drag on participation diminished by an estimated 1.6 percentage points from February 2022 to April 2023. Drawing on self-assessed causal effects in a separate analysis, infection worries lowered participation by an estimated one percentage point as of late 2022.
30568.zh_abstract: 许多处于工作年龄的美国人计划在COVID-19疫情结束后继续采取某些形式的社交距离。我们在每月进行的“工作安排与态度调查”中发现了这种长期社交距离现象。这种现象在老年人、受教育程度较低者以及那些与传染病高风险人群同住或照顾他们的人中更为强烈。基于个体层面数据的回归模型表明，社交距离在2022年使劳动力参与率降低了2.4个百分点，按收入加权计算则降低了1.2个百分点。这些影响高度集中在有长新冠经历或每天与高风险人群互动的人群中。当与简单的均衡模型相结合时，我们的结果表明，参与率拖累在2022年使美国产出减少了2050亿美元，使大学工资溢价缩小了2.1个百分点，并适度陡化了横截面年龄-工资曲线。从2022年2月到2023年4月，社交距离对参与率的拖累估计减少了1.6个百分点。根据另一项分析中自我评估的因果效应，截至2022年底，感染担忧使参与率估计降低了1个百分点。
30568.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：D12, E24, J14, J21, J22

30567.title: Older Workers’ Employment and Social Security Spillovers through the Second Year of the COVID-19 Pandemic
30567.zh_title: COVID-19疫情第二年中老年工人的就业与社会保障溢出效应
30567.authors: Gopi Shah Goda, Emilie Jackson, Lauren Hersch Nicholas, Sarah Stith
30567.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic triggered a large and immediate drop in employment among US workers, along with major expansions of unemployment insurance and work from home. We use Current Population Survey and Social Security application data to study employment among older adults and their participation in disability and retirement insurance programs through the second year of the pandemic. We find ongoing improvements in employment outcomes among older workers in the labor force, along with sustained higher levels in the share no longer in the labor force during this period. Applications for Social Security disability benefits remain depressed, particularly for Supplemental Security Income. In models accounting for the expiration of expanded unemployment insurance, we find some evidence that the loss of these additional financial supports resulted in an increase in disability claiming. Social Security retirement benefit claiming is approximately 3 percent higher during the second year of the pandemic.
30567.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫情引发了美国工人就业的大幅即时下降，同时失业保险的大幅扩张和居家办公也随之而来。我们利用当前人口调查和社会保障申请数据，研究了疫情第二年中老年人的就业状况及其在残疾和退休保险项目中的参与情况。我们发现，劳动力中老年工人的就业结果持续改善，同时在此期间不再处于劳动力队伍中的比例持续处于较高水平。社会保障残疾福利的申请仍然低迷，尤其是补充保障收入。在考虑扩大的失业保险到期因素的模型中，我们发现一些证据表明，这些额外财务支持的丧失导致了残疾申请的增加。在疫情的第二年，社会保障退休福利的申请大约高出3%。
30567.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：H31, H5, J14, J26

30566.title: Global Universal Basic Skills: Current Deficits and Implications for World Development
30566.zh_title: 全球通用基本技能：当前缺陷及其对世界发展的影响
30566.authors: Sarah Gust, Eric A. Hanushek, Ludger Woessmann
30566.abstract: How far is the world away from ensuring that every child obtains the basic skills needed to be competitive in a modern economy? And what would accomplishing this mean for world development? We provide new approaches for estimating the lack of basic skills that allow mapping achievement across countries of the world onto a common (PISA) scale. We then estimate the share of children not achieving basic skills for 159 countries that cover 98% of world population and 99% of world GDP. We find that at least two-thirds of the world’s youth do not reach basic skill levels, ranging from 24% in North America to 89% in South Asia and 94% in Sub-Saharan Africa. Our economic analysis suggests that the present value of lost world economic output due to missing the goal of global universal basic skills amounts to over $\$700$ trillion over the remaining century, or 12% of discounted GDP.
30566.zh_abstract: 世界距离确保每个儿童获得在现代经济中具备竞争力所需的基本技能还有多远？实现这一目标对世界发展意味着什么？我们提供了估算基本技能缺失的新方法，使得能够将世界各国学生的学业成就映射到共同的PISA量表上。随后，我们估算了159个国家（覆盖全球98%的人口和99%的GDP）中未达到基本技能水平的儿童比例。我们发现，全球至少三分之二的青年未达到基本技能水平，这一比例从北美的24%到南亚的89%和撒哈拉以南非洲的94%不等。我们的经济分析表明，由于未能实现全球通用基本技能目标，在本世纪剩余时间内，世界经济损失的现值超过700万亿美元，相当于折现后GDP的12%。
30566.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：I25, O15, O47

30565.title: Calculating the Costs and Benefits of Advance Preparations for Future Pandemics
30565.zh_title: 计算未来大流行病的预先准备成本与收益
30565.authors: Rachel Glennerster, Christopher M. Snyder, Brandon Joel Tan
30565.abstract: While Covid-19 vaccines were developed and deployed with unprecedented speed, their widespread introduction could have been accelerated—saving millions of lives and trillions of dollars—had more vaccine capacity been available prior to the pandemic. Combining estimates of the frequency and intensity of pandemics with estimates of mortality, economic-output, and human-capital losses from pandemics of varying severities, we calculate that the present value of global social losses from the stream of future pandemics can be expected to be nearly $\$18$ trillion—over $\$700$ billion each year going forward. According to our model, a program spending $\$60$ billion up front to expand production capacity and supply-chain inputs for vaccines and $\$5$ billion annually thereafter would be sufficient to ensure production capacity to vaccinate 70% of the global population against a new virus within six months. The program would generate an expected net present value (NPV) gain of more than $\$500$ billion over the status quo of delaying investment until a pandemic arrives. A program undertaken by the United States alone would generate an expected NPV gain of over $\$60$ billion.
30565.zh_abstract: 尽管新冠疫苗以前所未有的速度研发和部署，但如果在大流行之前就有更多的疫苗生产能力，其广泛推广本可以加速——从而挽救数百万人的生命并节省数万亿美元。结合对大流行频率和强度的估计，以及不同严重程度大流行导致的死亡率、经济产出和人力资本损失的估计，我们计算出未来一系列大流行造成的全球社会损失现值预计接近18万亿美元——即未来每年超过7000亿美元。根据我们的模型，一项前期投入600亿美元用于扩大疫苗生产能力和供应链投入、此后每年投入50亿美元的计划，将足以确保在六个月内为全球70%的人口生产针对新病毒的疫苗。与推迟投资直至大流行到来的现状相比，该计划预计将产生超过5000亿美元的净现值收益。仅由美国单独实施的一项计划预计将产生超过600亿美元的净现值收益。
30565.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LE, PE, PR；JEL：H44, I15, I18, L65

30564.title: Two-way Fixed Effects and Differences-in-Differences Estimators with Several Treatments
30564.zh_title: 具有多种处理的双向固定效应与双重差分估计量
30564.abstract: We study two-way-fixed-effects regressions (TWFE) with several treatment variables. Under a parallel trends assumption, we show that the coefficient on each treatment identifies a weighted sum of that treatment’s effect, with possibly negative weights, plus a weighted sum of the effects of the other treatments. Thus, those estimators are not robust to heterogeneous effects and may be contaminated by other treatments’ effects. We further show that omitting a treatment from the regression can actually reduce the estimator’s bias, unlike what would happen under constant treatment effects. We propose an alternative difference-in-differences estimator, robust to heterogeneous effects and immune to the contamination problem. In the application we consider, the TWFE regression identifies a highly non-convex combination of effects, with large contamination weights, and one of its coefficients significantly differs from our heterogeneity-robust estimator.
30564.zh_abstract: 我们研究了具有多种处理变量的双向固定效应回归。在平行趋势假设下，我们表明每个处理的系数识别的是该处理效应的加权和（权重可能为负），加上其他处理效应的加权和。因此，这些估计量对异质性效应不稳健，并且可能受到其他处理效应的污染。我们进一步表明，与恒定处理效应下的情况不同，从回归中省略一个处理实际上可以减少估计量的偏差。我们提出了一种替代的双重差分估计量，它对异质性效应稳健且不受污染问题的影响。在我们考虑的应用中，双向固定效应回归识别出一个高度非凸的效应组合，具有较大的污染权重，并且其一个系数与我们的异质性稳健估计量显著不同。
30564.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EEE, LS, PE, POL, PR, TWP；JEL：C21, C23

30563.title: The Effects of Racial Segregation on Intergenerational Mobility: Evidence from Historical Railroad Placement
30563.zh_title: 种族隔离对代际流动的影响：来自历史铁路布局的证据
30563.authors: Eric Chyn, Kareem Haggag, Bryan A. Stuart
30563.abstract: This paper provides new evidence on the causal impacts of city-wide racial segregation on intergenerational mobility. We use an instrumental variable approach that relies on plausibly exogenous variation in segregation due to the arrangement of railroad tracks in the nineteenth century. Our analysis finds that higher segregation reduces upward mobility for Black children from households across the income distribution and White children from low-income households. Moreover, segregation lowers academic achievement while increasing incarceration and teenage birth rates. An analysis of mechanisms shows that segregation reduces government spending, weakens support for anti-poverty policies, and increases racially conservative attitudes for White residents.
30563.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于全市范围种族隔离对代际流动性因果影响的新证据。我们使用工具变量方法，该方法依赖于19世纪铁路轨道布局带来的看似外生的隔离变化。我们的分析发现，更高的隔离程度降低了来自各收入阶层家庭的黑人儿童以及来自低收入家庭的白人儿童的向上流动性。此外，隔离降低了学业成绩，同时增加了监禁率和青少年生育率。对机制的分析表明，隔离减少了政府支出，削弱了对反贫困政策的支持，并增加了白人居民的种族保守态度。
30563.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D63, H0, J0, R0

30562.title: ESG Confusion and Stock Returns: Tackling the Problem of Noise
30562.zh_title: ESG混淆与股票回报：应对噪声问题
30562.authors: Florian Berg, Julian F. Koelbel, Anna Pavlova, Roberto Rigobon
30562.abstract: Existing measures of ESG (environmental, social, and governance) performance ESG ratings are noisy and, therefore, standard regression estimates of the effect of ESG performance on stock returns are biased.
